openaiApiKey.description: OpenAI API key (or set OPENAI_API_KEY env var)

openaiBaseUrl.description: Override the OpenAI API base URL for OpenAI-compatible providers (Scryr, Together, OpenRouter, etc.)

highSignalPatterns.description: Custom regex patterns for immediate extraction

memoryOsPreset.description: Optional named preset that seeds Engram's advanced config surface before explicit per-setting overrides are applied. `research` is accepted as a backward-compatible alias for `research-max`.

qmdColdTierEnabled.description: Enable cold-tier QMD recall from a secondary collection when hot recall misses

qmdColdCollection.description: Secondary QMD collection name used for cold-tier fallback recall

qmdColdMaxResults.description: Max cold-tier QMD results considered before final recall cap

qmdTierMigrationEnabled.description: Enable value-aware migration between hot and cold QMD tiers

qmdTierDemotionMinAgeDays.description: Minimum hot-memory age in days before tier demotion is eligible

qmdTierDemotionValueThreshold.description: Value-score threshold at or below which hot memories are eligible for cold demotion

qmdTierPromotionValueThreshold.description: Value-score threshold at or above which cold memories are eligible for hot promotion

qmdTierParityGraphEnabled.description: Apply graph-assist parity checks across hot and cold retrieval tiers

qmdTierParityHiMemEnabled.description: Apply HiMem episode/note parity checks across hot and cold retrieval tiers

qmdTierAutoBackfillEnabled.description: Allow automated cold-tier backfill jobs to repair parity gaps

embeddingFallbackEnabled.description: Enable embedding-based semantic recall fallback when QMD is unavailable or returns no matches

embeddingFallbackProvider.description: Embedding provider selection for semantic fallback

qmdPath.description: Optional absolute path to qmd binary (bypasses PATH/fallback discovery)

identityEnabled.description: Enable agent identity reflections (appends to workspace IDENTITY.md)

identityContinuityEnabled.description: Enable identity continuity workflows (anchor, incidents, audits)

identityInjectionMode.description: Controls when identity continuity context is injected into recall assembly

identityMaxInjectChars.description: Maximum characters allowed for identity continuity context injection

continuityIncidentLoggingEnabled.description: When unset, defaults to identityContinuityEnabled. Controls continuity incident logging artifacts.

continuityAuditEnabled.description: Enable continuity audit artifact generation workflows

sessionObserverEnabled.description: Enable heartbeat-driven active session observer checks for proactive extraction triggers.

sessionObserverDebounceMs.description: Minimum interval between heartbeat observer triggers per session (ms).

sessionObserverBands.description: Session size bands and growth thresholds for heartbeat observer triggers.

injectQuestions.description: Inject the most relevant open question into the system prompt

commitmentDecayDays.description: Days before fulfilled/expired commitments are removed

fileHygiene.description: Optional: keep OpenClaw bootstrap workspace files small and warn before silent truncation risk.

enabled.description: Master switch for file hygiene (default off).

lintEnabled.description: If true, warn when bootstrap files approach budget.

lintBudgetBytes.description: Budget in bytes used for lint warnings (approx).

lintWarnRatio.description: Warn when file size >= budget * warnRatio.

lintPaths.description: Workspace-relative paths to lint (or absolute paths).

rotateEnabled.description: If true, rotate oversized markdown files into an archive and replace with a lean index.

rotateMaxBytes.description: Rotate when a target file exceeds this size (bytes).

rotateKeepTailChars.description: How many characters of the old file to keep inline (tail) for continuity.

rotatePaths.description: Workspace-relative paths to rotate (or absolute paths).

archiveDir.description: Workspace-relative archive directory where rotated files are stored.

warningsLogEnabled.description: If true, append warnings to a log file under memoryDir.

warningsLogPath.description: memoryDir-relative path to write warnings to.

indexEnabled.description: Reserved: write an Engram index file in workspace (not required for rotation).

nativeKnowledge.description: Optional: search curated workspace markdown files directly during recall without converting them into durable memory files.

enabled.description: Master switch for curated workspace file recall.

includeFiles.description: Workspace-relative curated markdown files to scan for native knowledge recall.

maxChunkChars.description: Maximum chunk size per native knowledge section before it is split.

maxResults.description: Maximum native knowledge chunks to inject into recall.

maxChars.description: Maximum total characters to inject from native knowledge recall.

stateDir.description: Memory-relative directory used for backend-agnostic native knowledge sync state.

openclawWorkspace.description: Optional adapter for OpenClaw workspace artifacts such as bootstrap docs, handoffs, daily summaries, and automation notes.

enabled.description: Enable the OpenClaw workspace native-knowledge adapter.

bootstrapFiles.description: Workspace-relative bootstrap docs treated as high-confidence native knowledge.

handoffGlobs.description: Glob patterns (relative to workspaceDir) used to discover handoff notes.

dailySummaryGlobs.description: Glob patterns (relative to workspaceDir) used to discover daily summary notes.

automationNoteGlobs.description: Optional glob patterns for automation-written status or operating notes.

workspaceDocGlobs.description: Optional glob patterns for other explicitly allowlisted workspace docs.

excludeGlobs.description: Additional glob patterns appended to the built-in workspace safety excludes.

sharedSafeGlobs.description: Optional glob patterns that should be tagged as shared-safe when no explicit privacy class is present.

obsidianVaults.description: Optional Obsidian vault adapters to sync into backend-agnostic native knowledge records.

id.description: Stable vault identifier used in synced note metadata.

rootDir.description: Absolute path to the Obsidian vault root.

includeGlobs.description: Glob patterns (relative to the vault root) that are eligible for sync.

namespace.description: Default namespace assigned to records from this vault.

privacyClass.description: Operator-defined privacy class preserved on synced records.

folderRules.description: Optional per-folder overrides for namespace or privacy classification.

pathPrefix.description: Vault-relative folder prefix that activates the override.

dailyNotePatterns.description: Filename patterns used to derive daily-note dates (for example `YYYY-MM-DD` or `YYYY/MM/DD`).

materializeBacklinks.description: If true, compute backlinks from wikilink targets for recall hints and explainability.

agentAccessHttp.description: Optional: run a local authenticated HTTP API so non-OpenClaw clients can query Engram directly.

enabled.description: Start the local Engram HTTP access server during plugin startup.

host.description: Loopback host to bind for the Engram HTTP access server.

port.description: Bind port for the Engram HTTP access server. Use 0 for an ephemeral port.

authToken.description: Bearer token for the local Remnic HTTP API. Supports ${ENV_VAR} expansion. If omitted, OPENCLAW_ENGRAM_ACCESS_TOKEN is used.

principal.description: Optional trusted principal bound to the local Engram access bridge. When set, namespace write authorization is evaluated against this principal instead of any client-supplied sessionKey. If omitted, OPENCLAW_ENGRAM_ACCESS_PRINCIPAL is used when present.

maxBodyBytes.description: Maximum accepted JSON request body size for the local Remnic HTTP API.

accessTrackingEnabled.description: Track memory access counts and recency

accessTrackingBufferMaxSize.description: Max entries in access tracking buffer before flush

recencyWeight.description: Weight for recency boosting in search (0-1)

boostAccessCount.description: Boost frequently accessed memories in search results

recordEmptyRecallImpressions.description: Record recall impressions with empty memoryIds when no memory context is injected.

recallPlannerEnabled.description: Use lightweight retrieve-vs-think planning to avoid unnecessary recall work.

recallPlannerModel.description: Model to use for the recall planner.

recallPlannerTimeoutMs.description: Timeout in ms for recall planner inference.

recallPlannerUseResponsesApi.description: Use OpenAI Responses API for recall planner calls.

recallPlannerMaxPromptChars.description: Maximum characters of prompt context to send to the recall planner.

recallPlannerMaxMemoryHints.description: Maximum number of recent memory hints included in the recall planner prompt.

recallPlannerShadowMode.description: Run recall planner in shadow mode — evaluate but do not apply results.

recallPlannerTelemetryEnabled.description: Emit telemetry events for recall planner decisions.

recallPlannerMaxQmdResultsMinimal.description: QMD cap used when recall planner selects minimal mode.

recallPlannerMaxQmdResultsFull.description: QMD cap used when recall planner selects full mode.

intentRoutingEnabled.description: Attach intent metadata to memories and boost compatible memories at recall.

intentRoutingBoost.description: Maximum score boost applied for intent-compatible memory matches.

verbatimArtifactsEnabled.description: Write quote-first artifact anchors during extraction and include them in recall.

verbatimArtifactsMinConfidence.description: Minimum extraction confidence required before writing an artifact.

verbatimArtifactsMaxRecall.description: Maximum artifact anchors injected per recall.

verbatimArtifactCategories.description: Memory categories eligible for artifact extraction.

memoryBoxesEnabled.description: Enable Memory Boxes (v8.0 Phase 2A). Groups memories into topic-bounded windows. Disabled by default.

boxTopicShiftThreshold.description: Jaccard overlap threshold below which a topic shift seals the current box (0–1).

boxTimeGapMs.description: Time gap in milliseconds before an open box is sealed (default 30 min).

boxMaxMemories.description: Maximum memories per box before forced seal.

traceWeaverEnabled.description: Enable Trace Weaving (v8.0 Phase 2A). Links recurring topic boxes with a shared traceId.

traceWeaverLookbackDays.description: Days back to search for trace links.

traceWeaverOverlapThreshold.description: Minimum Jaccard topic overlap to assign the same traceId (0–1).

boxRecallDays.description: Number of recent days of boxes to inject during recall.

episodeNoteModeEnabled.description: Enable HiMem episode/note classification (v8.0 Phase 2B). Tags each extracted memory as 'episode' (time-specific event) or 'note' (stable belief/preference). Disabled by default.

queryAwareIndexingEnabled.description: Enable temporal and tag indexes (v8.1). Maintains state/index_time.json and state/index_tags.json for fast prefiltering. At recall time, temporal queries and #tag tokens receive a small score boost from the index. Disabled by default.

queryAwareIndexingMaxCandidates.description: Max candidate paths returned from index prefilter before scoring (0 = no cap).

temporalIndexWindowDays.description: Number of days to include in the temporal index window.

temporalIndexMaxEntries.description: Maximum number of entries in the temporal index.

temporalBoostRecentDays.description: Memories from the last N days receive a recency boost during recall.

temporalBoostScore.description: Score boost applied to recent memories during recall.

temporalDecayEnabled.description: Apply temporal decay to older memories during recall scoring.

tagMemoryEnabled.description: Enable tag-based memory indexing and recall boosting.

tagMaxPerMemory.description: Maximum number of tags assigned per memory.

tagIndexMaxEntries.description: Maximum number of entries in the tag index.

tagRecallBoost.description: Score boost applied to memories whose tags match the query.

tagRecallMaxMatches.description: Maximum number of tag-matched memories injected per recall.

multiGraphMemoryEnabled.description: Enable multi-graph memory (entity, time, causal edges). Default false.

graphRecallEnabled.description: Enable graph recall planner mode (`graph_mode`). Requires multiGraphMemoryEnabled. Default false.

graphRecallMaxExpansions.description: Maximum number of expansion hops per graph recall query.

graphRecallMaxPerSeed.description: Maximum graph-expanded results per seed node.

graphRecallMinEdgeWeight.description: Minimum edge weight to follow during graph recall traversal.

graphRecallShadowEnabled.description: Run graph recall in shadow mode — evaluate but do not inject results.

graphRecallSnapshotEnabled.description: Write graph recall snapshots for offline analysis.

graphRecallShadowSampleRate.description: Fraction of turns evaluated in shadow mode (0-1).

graphRecallExplainToolEnabled.description: Expose a graph explain tool to agents during graph recall.

graphRecallStoreColdMirror.description: Store cold-path graph recall results in a secondary QMD collection.

graphRecallColdMirrorCollection.description: QMD collection name for cold-mirror graph recall results.

graphRecallColdMirrorMinAgeDays.description: Minimum age in days for a memory to qualify for cold-mirror storage.

graphRecallUseEntityPriors.description: Boost seed nodes using entity prior scores during graph recall.

graphRecallEntityPriorBoost.description: Score boost applied to nodes with strong entity priors.

graphRecallPreferHubSeeds.description: Prefer high-degree hub nodes as graph recall seeds.

graphRecallRecencyHalfLifeDays.description: Half-life in days for recency decay applied to graph-expanded nodes.

graphRecallDampingFactor.description: PageRank-style damping factor for graph activation propagation.

graphRecallMaxSeedNodes.description: Maximum number of seed nodes selected for graph recall expansion.

graphRecallMaxExpandedNodes.description: Maximum total nodes visited during graph recall expansion.

graphRecallMaxTrailPerNode.description: Maximum trail length followed per node during graph traversal.

graphRecallMinSeedScore.description: Minimum QMD score for a memory to qualify as a graph recall seed.

graphRecallExpansionScoreThreshold.description: Minimum blended score required to include a graph-expanded node in results.

graphRecallExplainMaxPaths.description: Maximum reasoning paths included in a graph recall explanation.

graphRecallExplainMaxChars.description: Maximum characters per graph recall explanation.

graphRecallExplainEdgeLimit.description: Maximum edges described per node in a graph recall explanation.

graphRecallExplainEnabled.description: Append natural-language graph reasoning explanations to recall output.

graphRecallEntityHintsEnabled.description: Inject entity hint summaries alongside graph-recalled memories.

graphRecallEntityHintMax.description: Maximum number of entity hints injected per graph recall result.

graphRecallEntityHintMaxChars.description: Maximum characters per entity hint injected during graph recall.

graphRecallSnapshotDir.description: Directory for graph recall snapshot files (defaults to {memoryDir}/state/graph).

graphRecallEnableTrace.description: Enable detailed graph recall trace logging for debugging.

graphRecallEnableDebug.description: Enable verbose debug output for graph recall operations.

graphExpandedIntentEnabled.description: Escalate broader causal/timeline phrasing into graph_mode planning.

graphAssistInFullModeEnabled.description: Run bounded graph expansion during full recall mode when seed results exist.

graphAssistShadowEvalEnabled.description: In full mode, compute graph assist for comparison telemetry and snapshots but keep injected recall output baseline-identical.

graphAssistMinSeedResults.description: Minimum seed recall results required before full-mode graph assist runs.

entityGraphEnabled.description: Build entity co-reference graph (requires multiGraphMemoryEnabled). Default true.

timeGraphEnabled.description: Build temporal sequence graph within threads (requires multiGraphMemoryEnabled). Default true.

graphWriteSessionAdjacencyEnabled.description: Write fallback temporal adjacency edges for consecutive extracted memories in the same session.

causalGraphEnabled.description: Build causal inference graph from heuristic phrases (requires multiGraphMemoryEnabled). Default true.

maxGraphTraversalSteps.description: Maximum BFS hops during spreading activation. Default 3.

graphExpansionActivationWeight.description: Blend weight for graph activation when scoring expanded results (0-1). Higher values favor graph activation over seed QMD score.

graphExpansionBlendMin.description: Lower clamp bound for blended graph-expanded recall scores (0-1).

graphExpansionBlendMax.description: Upper clamp bound for blended graph-expanded recall scores (0-1).

maxEntityGraphEdgesPerMemory.description: Maximum entity graph edges written per memory write. Default 10.

delinearizeEnabled.description: SimpleMem-inspired de-linearization: resolve pronouns and anchor relative dates in extracted memories

recallConfidenceGateEnabled.description: Synapse-inspired confidence gate: skip memory injection when top recall score is below threshold

recallConfidenceGateThreshold.description: Minimum top recall score to inject memories (0-1). Below this, memories are rejected as too uncertain

causalRuleExtractionEnabled.description: PlugMem-inspired causal rule extraction: mine IF-THEN rules from conversations during consolidation

memoryReconstructionEnabled.description: E-Mem-inspired memory reconstruction: targeted secondary retrieval for entity references lacking context in recall

memoryReconstructionMaxExpansions.description: Maximum number of entity expansions per recall cycle

graphLateralInhibitionEnabled.description: Synapse-inspired lateral inhibition to suppress hub-node dominance in graph retrieval

graphLateralInhibitionBeta.description: Inhibition strength (0-1). Higher values suppress weaker nodes more aggressively

graphLateralInhibitionTopM.description: Number of top competing nodes considered for lateral inhibition

temporalMemoryTreeEnabled.description: Build a hierarchical memory summary tree (hour/day/week/persona nodes). Default: false.

tmtHourlyMinMemories.description: Minimum new memories in an hour to trigger an hour-level TMT node. Default: 3.

tmtSummaryMaxTokens.description: Max tokens for each TMT summary node. Default: 300.

queryExpansionEnabled.description: Enable heuristic query expansion for retrieval (no LLM calls).

queryExpansionMaxQueries.description: Max expanded queries to run (including the original prompt).

queryExpansionMinTokenLen.description: Minimum token length to include in heuristic query expansion.

rerankEnabled.description: Enable LLM re-ranking of retrieved memories. Default off.

rerankProvider.description: Re-ranking provider: 'local' uses local LLM only. 'cloud' is reserved/experimental (currently treated as no-op).

rerankMaxCandidates.description: Max candidates to send to the re-ranker.

rerankTimeoutMs.description: Timeout for re-ranking requests (ms). Fail-open on timeout.

rerankCacheEnabled.description: Cache re-ranking results in-memory for repeated queries.

feedbackEnabled.description: Enable feedback capture tool for memory relevance (thumbs up/down).

negativeExamplesEnabled.description: Enable negative examples (track retrieved-but-not-useful memories) and apply a small ranking penalty.

negativeExamplesPenaltyPerHit.description: Ranking penalty per negative example hit (keep small; QMD scores are ~0-1).

negativeExamplesPenaltyCap.description: Maximum ranking penalty applied from negative examples.

chunkingEnabled.description: Enable automatic chunking of long memories

chunkingOverlapSentences.description: Number of sentences to overlap between chunks

contradictionDetectionEnabled.description: Enable automatic contradiction detection with LLM verification

contradictionSimilarityThreshold.description: QMD similarity threshold to trigger contradiction check

contradictionMinConfidence.description: Minimum LLM confidence to auto-resolve contradictions

memoryLinkingEnabled.description: Enable automatic memory linking to build knowledge graph

threadingGapMinutes.description: Minutes of gap to start a new thread

summarizationTriggerCount.description: Memory count threshold to trigger summarization

summarizationRecentToKeep.description: Number of recent memories to keep uncompressed

summarizationImportanceThreshold.description: Only compress memories with importance below this threshold

summarizationProtectedTags.description: Tags that protect memories from compression

topicExtractionTopN.description: Number of top topics to extract

captureMode.description: Memory capture policy. implicit preserves normal extraction, explicit stores only structured capture, and hybrid allows both.

transcriptSkipChannelTypes.description: Channel types to skip from transcript logging (e.g., cron)

transcriptRecallHours.description: Hours of transcript history to recall

compactionResetEnabled.description: Trigger session reset after compaction with BOOT.md injection (requires OC fork with api.resetSession)

daySummaryEnabled.description: Enable end-of-day summary generation via engram.day_summary MCP tool

summaryRecallHours.description: Hours of summary history to recall

maxSummaryCount.description: Maximum number of summaries to inject

summaryModel.description: Model for hourly summaries (defaults to main model)

modelSource.description: LLM source: 'plugin' uses Engram's own openai/localLlm config; 'gateway' delegates to a gateway agent's model chain (agents.list[]).

gatewayAgentId.description: Agent persona ID (from openclaw.json agents.list[]) whose model chain to use for extraction, consolidation, and summarization. Required when modelSource is 'gateway'. Falls back to agents.defaults.model if empty.

fastGatewayAgentId.description: Agent persona ID for fast-tier ops (rerank, entity summaries, compression guidelines). When modelSource is 'gateway' and this is empty, fast ops use the same chain as gatewayAgentId.

localLlmEnabled.description: Enable local LLM for extraction and summarization (e.g., LM Studio, Ollama)

localLlmUrl.description: URL for local LLM OpenAI-compatible endpoint

localLlmModel.description: Model name for local LLM requests

localLlmApiKey.description: Optional API key for authenticated OpenAI-compatible local endpoints

localLlmHeaders.description: Optional additional headers for local/compatible endpoint requests

localLlmAuthHeader.description: If false, do not send Authorization header even when localLlmApiKey is set

localLlmFallback.description: Fall back to cloud OpenAI if local LLM is unavailable

localLlmHomeDir.description: Optional home directory override for local LLM helpers (LM Studio settings + CLI PATH resolution).

localLmsCliPath.description: Optional absolute path to LMS CLI binary. Preferred over auto-detected locations.

localLmsBinDir.description: Optional bin directory prepended to PATH for LMS CLI execution.

localLlmTimeoutMs.description: Hard timeout for local LLM requests (ms)

slowLogEnabled.description: If enabled, log slow operations (durations + metadata; never logs content)

traceRecallContent.description: If true, include the full recalled memory text in RecallTraceEvent.recalledContent emitted to __openclawEngramTrace subscribers (e.g. Langfuse). Disabled by default — only enable when you want external trace collectors to capture injected memory context.

profilingEnabled.description: If true, enable performance profiling for recall and extraction pipelines. Profiling data is stored locally in the profiling storage directory.

profilingStorageDir.description: Directory path for storing profiling trace files. Defaults to <memoryDir>/profiling if empty.

profilingMaxTraces.description: Maximum number of profiling trace files to retain. Oldest traces are pruned when this limit is exceeded.

extractionDedupeEnabled.description: Enable deduplication of near-identical extraction batches within a time window.

extractionMinChars.description: Minimum combined user/assistant characters required before extraction runs.

extractionMinImportanceLevel.description: Minimum locally-scored importance level required to persist an extracted fact. Facts below this level are dropped before write and counted toward the importance_gated metric. Default "low" drops only trivial turn-level chatter (greetings, single-word replies); raise to "normal" or higher for a stricter gate.

extractionMinUserTurns.description: Minimum number of user turns required before extraction runs.

extractionMaxTurnChars.description: Maximum characters per turn fed to extraction (long turns are truncated).

extractionMaxFactsPerRun.description: Maximum facts persisted from a single extraction run.

extractionMaxEntitiesPerRun.description: Maximum entities persisted from a single extraction run.

extractionMaxQuestionsPerRun.description: Maximum questions persisted from a single extraction run.

extractionMaxProfileUpdatesPerRun.description: Maximum profile updates persisted from a single extraction run.

consolidationRequireNonZeroExtraction.description: Only schedule consolidation when the last extraction produced durable outputs.

qmdMaintenanceEnabled.description: Enable debounced background QMD maintenance instead of immediate updates on extraction.

qmdMaintenanceDebounceMs.description: Debounce window for background QMD maintenance updates (ms).

qmdAutoEmbedEnabled.description: If true, background QMD maintenance also runs embed on a throttled cadence.

qmdEmbedMinIntervalMs.description: Minimum interval between background QMD embed runs (ms).

qmdUpdateTimeoutMs.description: Timeout for QMD update command (ms). Increase if your index grows and updates exceed 30s.

qmdUpdateMinIntervalMs.description: Minimum interval between QMD update executions (ms). Useful because current QMD update runs globally across collections.

localLlmRetry5xxCount.description: Number of retry attempts for local LLM 5xx responses.

localLlmRetryBackoffMs.description: Base backoff delay between local LLM retries (ms).

localLlm400TripThreshold.description: Consecutive 400 responses before local LLM enters temporary cooldown.

localLlm400CooldownMs.description: Cooldown duration after tripping local LLM 400 threshold (ms).

localLlmMaxContext.description: Override the detected context window for local LLM. Set to 32768 if your LLM server defaults to 32K context despite the model supporting 128K.

localLlmFastEnabled.description: Enable a separate smaller/faster local LLM for quick operations (rerank, entity_summary, tmt_summary, compression_guideline).

localLlmFastModel.description: Model ID for fast-tier local LLM operations. Empty string uses the primary localLlmModel.

localLlmFastUrl.description: Endpoint for the fast-tier local LLM. Defaults to the same endpoint as localLlmUrl when not set.

localLlmFastTimeoutMs.description: Timeout for fast-tier local LLM requests (ms). Lower than primary since fast ops should complete quickly.

hourlySummaryCronAutoRegister.description: If true, Engram may attempt to auto-register an hourly summary cron job (default off).

nightlyGovernanceCronAutoRegister.description: If true, Engram may attempt to auto-register the nightly governance cron job (default off).

hourlySummariesExtendedEnabled.description: Enable structured hourly summaries (topics/decisions/action items/rejections). Default off.

hourlySummariesIncludeToolStats.description: Include tool usage counts in extended hourly summaries (requires tool usage capture).

hourlySummariesIncludeSystemMessages.description: Include system messages in extended hourly summaries (use with care).

hourlySummariesMaxTurnsPerRun.description: Maximum transcript turns to consider per session per hourly summarizer run.

conversationIndexEnabled.description: Enable conversation chunk indexing + semantic recall hook (default off).

conversationIndexBackend.description: Backend for conversation indexing. qmd indexes chunk docs into a QMD collection; faiss uses the bundled Python sidecar and local FAISS artifacts under memoryDir/state/conversation-index/faiss.

conversationIndexQmdCollection.description: QMD collection to use for conversation chunk search (must be configured in ~/.config/qmd/index.yml).

conversationIndexRetentionDays.description: Days to retain conversation chunk docs.

conversationIndexMinUpdateIntervalMs.description: Minimum interval between conversation_index_update runs per session (ms). Prevents redundant reindex churn.

conversationIndexEmbedOnUpdate.description: If true, conversation_index_update also runs QMD embed by default. Keep false for lower load.

conversationIndexFaissScriptPath.description: Optional absolute path to FAISS sidecar script. If unset, uses built-in default script location.

conversationIndexFaissPythonBin.description: Optional Python executable used to run the FAISS sidecar (for example python3.11).

conversationIndexFaissModelId.description: Embedding model identifier passed to the FAISS sidecar. By default the sidecar aliases OpenAI embedding ids to a local sentence-transformers model when ENGRAM_FAISS_ENABLE_ST=1, and otherwise falls back to deterministic hash embeddings.

conversationIndexFaissIndexDir.description: Relative directory under memoryDir where FAISS sidecar artifacts are stored, including index.faiss, metadata.jsonl, and manifest.json.

conversationIndexFaissHealthTimeoutMs.description: Timeout (ms) for FAISS health checks. Health is fail-open and reports degraded when dependencies or local artifacts are missing.

conversationIndexFaissMaxBatchSize.description: Maximum transcript chunk batch size per FAISS upsert call.

conversationIndexFaissMaxSearchK.description: Maximum top-K allowed for FAISS search requests.

conversationRecallMaxChars.description: Max characters of semantic conversation recall to inject.

conversationRecallTimeoutMs.description: Timeout for semantic conversation recall search (ms). Fail-open on timeout.

evalHarnessEnabled.description: Enable Engram's benchmark/evaluation harness foundation for tracking benchmark packs and run summaries.

evalShadowModeEnabled.description: Enable shadow-mode evaluation workflows so future benchmark instrumentation can measure memory changes without changing live recall output.

benchmarkBaselineSnapshotsEnabled.description: Enable versioned benchmark baseline snapshot artifacts under the eval store for later PR delta reporting.

benchmarkStoredBaselineEnabled.description: Enable stored baseline comparisons for benchmark delta reporting.

benchmarkDeltaReporterEnabled.description: Enable named-baseline delta reports so PR candidates can be compared against stored benchmark baselines.

evalStoreDir.description: Override the evaluation harness state directory (defaults to {memoryDir}/state/evals).

objectiveStateMemoryEnabled.description: Enable Engram's objective-state memory foundation for normalized world/tool state snapshots.

objectiveStateSnapshotWritesEnabled.description: Allow writing typed objective-state snapshots to the objective-state store.

objectiveStateRecallEnabled.description: Inject prompt-relevant objective-state snapshots into recall context.

objectiveStateStoreDir.description: Override the objective-state memory directory (defaults to {memoryDir}/state/objective-state).

causalTrajectoryMemoryEnabled.description: Enable Engram's causal-trajectory memory foundation for typed goal-action-observation-outcome chains.

causalTrajectoryStoreDir.description: Override the causal-trajectory memory directory (defaults to {memoryDir}/state/causal-trajectories).

causalTrajectoryRecallEnabled.description: Inject prompt-relevant causal trajectories into recall context.

trustZonesEnabled.description: Enable Engram's trust-zone memory foundation for quarantine, working, and trusted records.

quarantinePromotionEnabled.description: Reserve future promotion flows from quarantine into higher-trust zones.

trustZoneStoreDir.description: Override the trust-zone store directory (defaults to {memoryDir}/state/trust-zones).

trustZoneRecallEnabled.description: Inject prompt-relevant working and trusted trust-zone records into recall context.

memoryPoisoningDefenseEnabled.description: Enable deterministic provenance trust scoring for trust-zone records as the first poisoning-defense surface.

memoryRedTeamBenchEnabled.description: Enable operator-facing memory red-team benchmark packs and status accounting for poisoning-defense regression suites.

harmonicRetrievalEnabled.description: Enable harmonic retrieval blending over abstraction nodes and cue anchors, including recall-section injection and harmonic-search diagnostics.

abstractionAnchorsEnabled.description: Enable typed cue-anchor indexing for abstraction nodes and expose it through cue-anchor status tooling.

abstractionNodeStoreDir.description: Override the abstraction-node store directory (defaults to {memoryDir}/state/abstraction-nodes).

verifiedRecallEnabled.description: Inject prompt-relevant memory boxes only when their cited source memories verify as non-archived episodes.

semanticRulePromotionEnabled.description: Enable deterministic promotion of explicit IF/THEN rules from verified episodic memories.

semanticRuleVerificationEnabled.description: Verify promoted semantic rules against their cited source episodes at recall time before surfacing them in recall.

semanticConsolidationEnabled.description: Enable periodic semantic consolidation of similar memories.

semanticConsolidationModel.description: LLM for consolidation synthesis: 'auto' (primary model), 'fast' (fast local model), or a specific model name.

semanticConsolidationThreshold.description: Token overlap threshold (0-1) for grouping similar memories. 0.8=conservative, 0.6=aggressive.

semanticConsolidationMinClusterSize.description: Minimum cluster size before consolidation triggers.

semanticConsolidationExcludeCategories.description: Memory categories excluded from semantic consolidation.

semanticConsolidationIntervalHours.description: Hours between automatic consolidation runs (168 = weekly).

semanticConsolidationMaxPerRun.description: Max memories to consolidate per run to limit LLM cost.

creationMemoryEnabled.description: Enable creation-memory foundations, including the work-product ledger for explicit outputs agents create.

memoryUtilityLearningEnabled.description: Enable utility-learning telemetry storage so later slices can learn promotion and ranking weights from downstream outcomes.

promotionByOutcomeEnabled.description: Enable outcome-aware promotion controls that consume learned utility signals when later rollout slices activate them.

commitmentLedgerEnabled.description: Enable the explicit commitment ledger for promises, follow-ups, deadlines, and unfinished obligations.

commitmentLifecycleEnabled.description: Enable commitment lifecycle transitions, stale tracking, and resolved-entry cleanup for the commitment ledger.

commitmentStaleDays.description: Days before an open commitment without a due date is considered stale in lifecycle status.

commitmentLedgerDir.description: Override the commitment ledger directory (defaults to {memoryDir}/state/commitment-ledger).

resumeBundlesEnabled.description: Enable deterministic resume-bundle storage and operator-facing handoff bundle commands.

workProductRecallEnabled.description: Inject prompt-relevant work-product ledger entries into recall context and expose artifact-recovery search tooling.

workProductLedgerDir.description: Override the work-product ledger directory (defaults to {memoryDir}/state/work-product-ledger).

workTasksEnabled.description: Enable task tracking within the work product system.

workProjectsEnabled.description: Enable project tracking within the work product system.

workTasksDir.description: Override the work tasks directory (defaults to {memoryDir}/work/tasks).

workProjectsDir.description: Override the work projects directory (defaults to {memoryDir}/work/projects).

workIndexEnabled.description: Enable search index for work tasks and projects.

workIndexDir.description: Override the work index directory (defaults to {memoryDir}/work/index).

workTaskIndexEnabled.description: Include tasks in the work search index.

workProjectIndexEnabled.description: Include projects in the work search index.

workIndexAutoRebuildEnabled.description: Automatically rebuild the work index when tasks or projects change.

workIndexAutoRebuildDebounceMs.description: Debounce delay in ms before triggering auto-rebuild of the work index.

actionGraphRecallEnabled.description: Write action-conditioned causal-stage edges from typed trajectory records into the causal graph.

principalFromSessionKeyMode.description: How to derive principal identity from sessionKey.

principalFromSessionKeyRules.description: Rules for resolving principal from sessionKey (ordered).

defaultRecallNamespaces.description: Which namespaces to include by default in recall.

cronRecallMode.description: Recall behavior for cron sessions. Use allowlist to opt specific cron sessionKeys in.

cronRecallAllowlist.description: Session-key wildcard patterns (supports *) allowed for recall when cronRecallMode=allowlist.

cronRecallPolicyEnabled.description: Enable prompt-shape-aware recall query normalization for cron sessions.

cronRecallNormalizedQueryMaxChars.description: Maximum query length (characters) used for cron recall retrieval after normalization.

cronRecallInstructionHeavyTokenCap.description: Maximum token count used to build compact retrieval queries for instruction-heavy cron prompts.

cronConversationRecallMode.description: Controls conversation semantic recall in cron sessions. auto skips it for instruction-heavy prompts.

autoPromoteToSharedEnabled.description: If enabled, Engram may auto-promote selected categories to shared (reserved; conservative).

autoPromoteToSharedCategories.description: Categories eligible for auto-promotion to shared.

routingRulesEnabled.description: Enable custom memory routing rules (v8.7). Default off.

routingRulesStateFile.description: Relative path under memoryDir for persisted routing rules.

sharedContextEnabled.description: Enable shared-context injection + tools (v4.0). Default off.

sharedContextMaxInjectChars.description: Max characters of shared-context to inject into each prompt.

sharedCrossSignalSemanticEnabled.description: Enable semantic cross-signal enhancer during shared-context daily curation.

sharedCrossSignalSemanticTimeoutMs.description: Timeout budget for shared-context semantic cross-signal enhancer (ms).

sharedCrossSignalSemanticMaxCandidates.description: Maximum candidate topic tokens considered by semantic cross-signal enhancer.

compoundingWeeklyCronEnabled.description: If true, compounding weekly synthesis can be scheduled externally via cron.

compoundingInjectEnabled.description: Inject compounded mistakes/patterns into recall when compounding is enabled.

factDeduplicationEnabled.description: Enable content-hash deduplication to prevent storing semantically identical facts.

semanticDedupEnabled.description: Issue #373 — enable write-time semantic similarity guard that skips near-duplicate facts by comparing embeddings to existing memories. Fails open when the embedding backend is unavailable.

semanticDedupThreshold.description: Cosine similarity threshold in [0, 1]. Candidate facts whose nearest neighbor scores at or above this value are treated as duplicates and skipped.

semanticDedupCandidates.description: Number of nearest-neighbor candidates to inspect during the write-time semantic dedup check.

factArchivalEnabled.description: Enable automatic archival of old, low-importance, rarely-accessed facts during consolidation.

factArchivalAgeDays.description: Minimum age in days before a fact is eligible for archival.

factArchivalMaxImportance.description: Maximum importance score for archival eligibility (0-1). Only facts below this threshold are archived.

factArchivalMaxAccessCount.description: Maximum access count for archival eligibility. Only rarely-accessed facts are archived.

factArchivalProtectedCategories.description: Categories that protect a fact from archival regardless of other criteria.

lifecycleFilterStaleEnabled.description: If enabled, stale lifecycle memories can be filtered from retrieval (wired in PR20D).

lifecyclePromoteHeatThreshold.description: Heat threshold for lifecycle promotion to validated/active states.

lifecycleStaleDecayThreshold.description: Decay threshold for lifecycle demotion to stale.

lifecycleArchiveDecayThreshold.description: Decay threshold for lifecycle demotion to archived state semantics.

lifecycleProtectedCategories.description: Categories that lifecycle policy will not auto-archive.

lifecycleMetricsEnabled.description: Emit lifecycle metrics snapshots to state/lifecycle-metrics.json when policy is enabled.

proactiveExtractionEnabled.description: Enable proactive self-questioning extraction second-pass (v8.3, default off).

contextCompressionActionsEnabled.description: Enable context compression action tooling and telemetry paths (v8.3, default off).

compressionGuidelineLearningEnabled.description: Enable adaptive compression guideline learning from memory-action outcomes (v8.3, default off).

compressionGuidelineSemanticRefinementEn.description: Enable optional semantic refinement pass after deterministic guideline candidate generation (v8.11, default off).

compressionGuidelineSemanticTimeoutMs.description: Hard timeout in milliseconds for semantic refinement; timeout fail-opens to deterministic output.

maxProactiveQuestionsPerExtraction.description: Maximum proactive self-questions generated per extraction pass (0 disables question generation).

proactiveExtractionTimeoutMs.description: Hard timeout in milliseconds for proactive self-question generation and answer synthesis (0 disables the proactive second pass).

proactiveExtractionMaxTokens.description: Token budget for each proactive extraction sub-call (0 disables the proactive second pass).

extractionMaxOutputTokens.description: Maximum output tokens (max_completion_tokens) for the direct-client extraction call.

proactiveExtractionCategoryAllowlist.description: Optional memory categories allowed from proactive second-pass writes. When omitted, proactive writes can emit any standard memory category.

maxCompressionTokensPerHour.description: Hourly token budget for compression actions/guideline generation (0 disables budgeted compression work).

behaviorLoopAutoTuneEnabled.description: Enable runtime behavior-loop policy auto-tuning (v8.15, default off).

behaviorLoopLearningWindowDays.description: Rolling signal window used for behavior-loop policy learning (days; 0 allowed).

behaviorLoopMinSignalCount.description: Minimum signal volume required before behavior-loop adjustments are emitted (0 allowed).

behaviorLoopMaxDeltaPerCycle.description: Maximum absolute parameter delta allowed per learning cycle (0-1).

behaviorLoopProtectedParams.description: Runtime parameters that auto-tuning must never modify.

searchBackend.description: Search backend: qmd (local hybrid), remote (HTTP REST), noop (disabled), lancedb (embedded hybrid), meilisearch (server-based), orama (embedded JS)

remoteSearchBaseUrl.description: Base URL for remote search backend (when searchBackend=remote)

remoteSearchApiKey.description: API key for remote search backend (when searchBackend=remote)

remoteSearchTimeoutMs.description: Timeout in ms for remote search backend requests

calibrationEnabled.description: Enable recall calibration rules injection (v9.0, default off).

calibrationMaxRulesPerRecall.description: Maximum number of calibration rules to inject per recall pass.

calibrationMaxChars.description: Maximum characters of calibration content to inject per recall pass.

lancedbEnabled.description: Enable LanceDB as a supplemental search backend.

lanceDbPath.description: Directory path for LanceDB storage (when searchBackend=lancedb)

lanceEmbeddingDimension.description: Embedding vector dimension for LanceDB (when searchBackend=lancedb)

meilisearchEnabled.description: Enable Meilisearch as a supplemental search backend.

meilisearchTimeoutMs.description: Timeout in ms for Meilisearch requests (when searchBackend=meilisearch)

meilisearchAutoIndex.description: Automatically push local memory docs to Meilisearch on update (when searchBackend=meilisearch)

oramaEnabled.description: Enable Orama as a supplemental search backend.

oramaDbPath.description: Directory path for Orama persistence files (when searchBackend=orama)

oramaEmbeddingDimension.description: Embedding vector dimension for Orama (when searchBackend=orama)

qmdDaemonEnabled.description: Prefer the shared QMD MCP session for faster searches when available.

qmdDaemonUrl.description: Legacy compatibility setting retained for QMD daemon configuration.

qmdDaemonRecheckIntervalMs.description: Re-probe interval when daemon is down (ms)

qmdIntentHintsEnabled.description: Pass Engram's inferred recall intent into QMD unified search when supported.

qmdExplainEnabled.description: Request QMD explain traces for recall debugging when supported.

knowledgeIndexEnabled.description: Inject a compact Knowledge Index of top entities into every recall

knowledgeIndexMaxEntities.description: Max entities included in the Knowledge Index

knowledgeIndexMaxChars.description: Hard character cap for the Knowledge Index section

entityRetrievalEnabled.description: Enable entity-oriented recall hints for direct entity questions and short follow-up queries.

entityRetrievalMaxChars.description: Hard character cap for the entity retrieval section.

entityRetrievalMaxHints.description: Maximum entity targets summarized in one recall pass.

entityRetrievalMaxSupportingFacts.description: Maximum supporting fact/timeline snippets considered per entity target.

entityRetrievalMaxRelatedEntities.description: Maximum related entities listed per target when confidence is high.

entityRetrievalRecentTurns.description: Recent transcript turns scanned for pronoun carry-forward and short follow-up resolution.

entityActivityLogMaxEntries.description: Max activity entries per entity before oldest are pruned

entitySummaryEnabled.description: Generate LLM summaries for entities during consolidation

recallBudgetChars.description: Hard character cap for total recall injection. Defaults to maxMemoryTokens * 4.

recallOuterTimeoutMs.description: Outer timeout in ms for the full recall pipeline.

recallCoreDeadlineMs.description: Default deadline in ms recorded for core recall sections.

recallEnrichmentDeadlineMs.description: Default deadline in ms recorded for enrichment recall sections.

recallMmrEnabled.description: Apply Maximal Marginal Relevance to the final recall selection per-section so one redundant cluster cannot dominate the injected context.

recallMmrLambda.description: MMR lambda parameter. 1.0 = pure relevance, 0.0 = pure diversity. Default 0.7 tilts toward relevance with meaningful diversity.

recallMmrTopN.description: Number of top candidates per section to run MMR over. Candidates past this remain in original order.

recallPipeline.description: Ordered recall sections with per-section budgets and feature knobs.

qmdRecallCacheTtlMs.description: Fresh TTL in ms for rendered QMD recall enrichment cache entries.

qmdRecallCacheStaleTtlMs.description: Maximum stale TTL in ms for rendered QMD recall cache fallbacks.

qmdRecallCacheMaxEntries.description: Maximum in-memory rendered QMD recall cache entries before oldest eviction.

lcmLeafBatchSize.description: Number of turns per leaf node in the LCM DAG

lcmRollupFanIn.description: Number of children per rollup node in the LCM DAG

lcmFreshTailTurns.description: Number of recent turns kept verbatim (not summarized)

lcmMaxDepth.description: Maximum depth of the LCM summary DAG

lcmRecallBudgetShare.description: Fraction of recall budget allocated to LCM compressed history (0-1)

lcmArchiveRetentionDays.description: Days to retain archived LCM summaries

ircEnabled.description: Enable Inductive Rule Consolidation (IRC) subsystem (default on).

ircMaxPreferences.description: Maximum number of preferences to include in IRC rule injection.

ircIncludeCorrections.description: Include corrections when building IRC rules (default on).

ircMinConfidence.description: Minimum confidence threshold for an IRC rule to be included (0-1).

cmcEnabled.description: Enable Causal Memory Consolidation (CMC) subsystem (default off).

cmcStitchLookbackDays.description: Number of days to look back when stitching causal trajectories.

cmcStitchMinScore.description: Minimum score for a causal edge to be stitched into a trajectory.

cmcStitchMaxEdgesPerTrajectory.description: Maximum edges per trajectory during CMC stitching.

cmcConsolidationMinRecurrence.description: Minimum recurrence count before a CMC pattern is consolidated.

cmcConsolidationMinSessions.description: Minimum sessions a CMC pattern must appear in before consolidation.

cmcConsolidationSuccessThreshold.description: Minimum success ratio required to consolidate a CMC pattern (0-1).

cmcRetrievalEnabled.description: Enable CMC retrieval injection at recall time (default off).

cmcRetrievalMaxDepth.description: Maximum graph depth traversed during CMC retrieval.

cmcRetrievalMaxChars.description: Maximum characters of CMC content injected per recall pass.

cmcRetrievalCounterfactualBoost.description: Score boost applied to counterfactual nodes during CMC retrieval (0-1).

cmcBehaviorLearningEnabled.description: Enable CMC behavior pattern learning (default off).

cmcBehaviorMinFrequency.description: Minimum frequency for a behavior pattern to be learned by CMC.

cmcBehaviorMinSessions.description: Minimum sessions a behavior must appear in before CMC learns it.

cmcBehaviorConfidenceThreshold.description: Minimum confidence threshold for CMC behavior patterns (0-1).

cmcLifecycleCausalImpactWeight.description: Weight of causal impact score in CMC lifecycle scoring.

parallelRetrievalEnabled.description: Enable three-agent parallel retrieval (DirectFact + Contextual + Temporal). Zero additional LLM cost. Default false.

parallelAgentWeights.description: Score weights per retrieval agent source applied during result merge.

parallelMaxResultsPerAgent.description: Maximum results fetched per agent before merge.

openaiBaseUrl.label: OpenAI Base URL
openaiBaseUrl.help: Override for OpenAI-compatible providers (Scryr, Together, OpenRouter, etc.)

memoryOsPreset.label: Memory OS Preset
memoryOsPreset.help: Optional preset: conservative, balanced, research-max, or local-llm-heavy. `research` remains accepted as a backward-compatible alias. Explicit settings still win.

qmdColdTierEnabled.label: Enable Cold QMD Tier
qmdColdTierEnabled.help: When hot recall misses, query a secondary cold QMD collection before archive scan fallback

qmdTierAutoBackfillEnabled.label: Tier Auto Backfill
qmdTierAutoBackfillEnabled.help: Enable automated cold-tier backfill runs for parity repair

embeddingFallbackEnabled.label: Embedding Fallback
embeddingFallbackEnabled.help: Use semantic embeddings when QMD is unavailable or no results are found

qmdPath.label: QMD Path
qmdPath.help: Optional absolute path to qmd binary for environments with unstable PATH/bun shims

identityEnabled.label: Identity Reflections
identityEnabled.help: Append self-reflections to workspace IDENTITY.md after each extraction

identityContinuityEnabled.label: Identity Continuity
identityContinuityEnabled.help: Enable identity continuity workflows (anchor, incidents, audits)

identityInjectionMode.label: Identity Injection Mode
identityInjectionMode.help: When to inject identity continuity context: recovery_only, minimal, or full

continuityIncidentLoggingEnabled.label: Continuity Incident Logging
continuityIncidentLoggingEnabled.help: When omitted, follows Identity Continuity enabled state

sessionObserverEnabled.label: Session Observer
sessionObserverEnabled.help: Observe heartbeat growth and proactively trigger extraction when configured thresholds are crossed

sessionObserverBands.label: Observer Size Bands
sessionObserverBands.help: Array of {maxBytes, triggerDeltaBytes, triggerDeltaTokens} threshold objects

injectQuestions.label: Inject Questions
injectQuestions.help: Include the most relevant open question in the system prompt

accessTrackingEnabled.label: Access Tracking
accessTrackingEnabled.help: Track which memories are accessed most frequently

recencyWeight.label: Recency Weight
recencyWeight.help: How much to boost recent memories in search (0-1)

boostAccessCount.label: Boost Frequent Access
boostAccessCount.help: Rank frequently accessed memories higher in search

captureMode.label: Capture Mode
captureMode.help: Choose whether Engram stores only explicit notes, normal extraction, or both.

agentAccessHttp.label: Local HTTP Access
agentAccessHttp.help: Enable a local authenticated HTTP API for external Engram clients

negativeExamplesEnabled.label: Negative Examples
negativeExamplesEnabled.help: Track retrieved-but-not-useful memories and apply a small ranking penalty (optional)

chunkingEnabled.label: Enable Chunking
chunkingEnabled.help: Automatically split long memories into overlapping chunks for better retrieval

contradictionDetectionEnabled.label: Contradiction Detection
contradictionDetectionEnabled.help: Detect and resolve conflicting memories using LLM verification

contradictionAutoResolve.label: Auto-Resolve Contradictions
contradictionAutoResolve.help: Automatically supersede old memories when contradiction is confirmed

memoryLinkingEnabled.label: Memory Linking
memoryLinkingEnabled.help: Build knowledge graph by linking related memories

threadingEnabled.label: Conversation Threading
threadingEnabled.help: Group memories into conversation threads with auto-titles

summarizationEnabled.label: Memory Summarization
summarizationEnabled.help: Compress old, low-importance memories into summaries

topicExtractionEnabled.label: Topic Extraction
topicExtractionEnabled.help: Extract key topics from memory corpus

transcriptEnabled.label: Enable Transcript Archive
transcriptEnabled.help: Archive conversation transcripts for context preservation

transcriptSkipChannelTypes.label: Skip Channel Types
transcriptSkipChannelTypes.help: Channel types to exclude from transcript logging (default: cron)

checkpointEnabled.label: Enable Checkpoints
checkpointEnabled.help: Capture conversation checkpoints for resuming context

compactionResetEnabled.label: Compaction Reset
compactionResetEnabled.help: Reset session after compaction and inject BOOT.md for recovery

hourlySummariesEnabled.label: Enable Hourly Summaries
hourlySummariesEnabled.help: Generate hourly summaries of conversation activity

modelSource.label: Model Source
modelSource.help: Route LLM calls through the gateway's agent model chain instead of Engram's own config. When set to 'gateway', localLlm and openai settings are ignored.

gatewayAgentId.label: Gateway Agent ID
gatewayAgentId.help: Agent persona ID from openclaw.json agents.list[] whose model chain to use. Leave empty to use global defaults.

fastGatewayAgentId.label: Fast Gateway Agent ID
fastGatewayAgentId.help: Agent persona ID for fast-tier ops. Leave empty to use the primary gatewayAgentId.

localLlmEnabled.label: Enable Local LLM
localLlmEnabled.help: Use local LLM (LM Studio, Ollama, etc.) for extraction and summaries. Falls back to OpenAI if unavailable.

localLlmUrl.label: Local LLM URL
localLlmUrl.help: OpenAI-compatible endpoint URL for local LLM

localLlmModel.label: Local LLM Model
localLlmModel.help: Model identifier for local LLM requests

localLlmApiKey.label: Local LLM API Key
localLlmApiKey.help: Optional API key for authenticated OpenAI-compatible endpoints

localLlmHeaders.label: Local LLM Headers
localLlmHeaders.help: Optional extra headers for provider-specific routing/auth

localLlmAuthHeader.label: Send Auth Header
localLlmAuthHeader.help: When false, do not send Authorization header even if localLlmApiKey is set

localLlmFallback.label: Local LLM Fallback
localLlmFallback.help: Fall back to cloud OpenAI if local LLM fails or is unavailable

localLlmHomeDir.label: Local LLM Home Dir
localLlmHomeDir.help: Optional home directory override for LM Studio settings and local helper paths.

localLmsCliPath.label: LMS CLI Path
localLmsCliPath.help: Optional absolute path to LMS CLI. Overrides auto-detection.

localLmsBinDir.label: LMS Bin Dir
localLmsBinDir.help: Optional bin directory prepended to PATH for LMS CLI execution.

localLlmMaxContext.label: Local LLM Max Context
localLlmMaxContext.help: Override context window if your LLM server uses smaller default (e.g., 32768 for LM Studio default)

localLlmFastEnabled.label: Fast LLM Tier
localLlmFastEnabled.help: Use a separate smaller model for quick operations (rerank, entity summaries, compression guidelines)

localLlmFastModel.label: Fast LLM Model
localLlmFastModel.help: Model ID for fast-tier operations. Must be loaded in LM Studio alongside the primary model.

localLlmFastUrl.label: Fast LLM URL
localLlmFastUrl.help: Endpoint for fast-tier model. When not set, inherits the primary localLlmUrl.

localLlmFastTimeoutMs.label: Fast LLM Timeout (ms)
localLlmFastTimeoutMs.help: Timeout for fast-tier requests. Lower than primary since fast ops should complete quickly.

evalHarnessEnabled.label: Evaluation Harness
evalHarnessEnabled.help: Enable Engram's benchmark/evaluation harness foundation and benchmark-status diagnostics.

evalShadowModeEnabled.label: Evaluation Shadow Mode
evalShadowModeEnabled.help: Reserve shadow-mode measurement paths so future benchmark instrumentation can compare memory behavior without affecting live recall.

benchmarkBaselineSnapshotsEnabled.label: Benchmark Baseline Snapshots
benchmarkBaselineSnapshotsEnabled.help: Enable versioned benchmark baseline snapshot artifacts for later PR delta reporting.

benchmarkDeltaReporterEnabled.label: Benchmark Delta Reporter
benchmarkDeltaReporterEnabled.help: Enable named-baseline delta reports that compare the current eval store against a stored benchmark baseline snapshot.

evalStoreDir.label: Evaluation Store Directory
evalStoreDir.help: Override where benchmark packs and run summaries are stored.

objectiveStateMemoryEnabled.label: Objective-State Memory
objectiveStateMemoryEnabled.help: Enable the objective-state memory foundation for normalized world and tool state snapshots.

objectiveStateSnapshotWritesEnabled.label: Objective-State Snapshot Writes
objectiveStateSnapshotWritesEnabled.help: Allow snapshot writers to persist objective-state records into the objective-state store.

objectiveStateRecallEnabled.label: Objective-State Recall
objectiveStateRecallEnabled.help: Inject prompt-relevant objective-state snapshots into recall context.

objectiveStateStoreDir.label: Objective-State Store Directory
objectiveStateStoreDir.help: Override where objective-state snapshots are stored.

causalTrajectoryMemoryEnabled.label: Causal Trajectory Memory
causalTrajectoryMemoryEnabled.help: Enable the causal-trajectory memory foundation for typed goal-action-observation-outcome chains.

causalTrajectoryStoreDir.label: Causal Trajectory Store Directory
causalTrajectoryStoreDir.help: Override where causal-trajectory records are stored.

causalTrajectoryRecallEnabled.label: Causal Trajectory Recall
causalTrajectoryRecallEnabled.help: Inject prompt-relevant causal trajectories into recall context.

trustZonesEnabled.label: Trust Zones
trustZonesEnabled.help: Enable the trust-zone memory foundation for quarantine, working, and trusted records.

quarantinePromotionEnabled.label: Quarantine Promotion
quarantinePromotionEnabled.help: Reserve future promotion flows from quarantine into higher-trust zones.

trustZoneStoreDir.label: Trust-Zone Store Directory
trustZoneStoreDir.help: Override where trust-zone records are stored.

trustZoneRecallEnabled.label: Trust-Zone Recall
trustZoneRecallEnabled.help: Inject prompt-relevant working and trusted trust-zone records into recall context.

memoryPoisoningDefenseEnabled.label: Memory Poisoning Defense
memoryPoisoningDefenseEnabled.help: Enable provenance trust scoring in trust-zone status output as the first poisoning-defense signal.

memoryRedTeamBenchEnabled.label: Memory Red-Team Benchmarks
memoryRedTeamBenchEnabled.help: Enable operator-facing red-team benchmark pack support and status accounting for poisoning-defense suites.

harmonicRetrievalEnabled.label: Harmonic Retrieval
harmonicRetrievalEnabled.help: Enable harmonic retrieval blending over abstraction nodes and cue anchors, including recall-section injection and harmonic-search diagnostics.

abstractionAnchorsEnabled.label: Abstraction Anchors
abstractionAnchorsEnabled.help: Enable typed cue-anchor indexing for abstraction nodes and expose it through cue-anchor status tooling.

abstractionNodeStoreDir.label: Abstraction-Node Store Directory
abstractionNodeStoreDir.help: Override where abstraction nodes are stored.

verifiedRecallEnabled.label: Verified Recall
verifiedRecallEnabled.help: Inject prompt-relevant memory boxes only when their cited source memories verify as non-archived episodes.

semanticRulePromotionEnabled.label: Semantic Rule Promotion
semanticRulePromotionEnabled.help: Promote explicit IF/THEN rules from verified episodic memories into durable rule memories.

semanticRuleVerificationEnabled.label: Semantic Rule Verification
semanticRuleVerificationEnabled.help: Verify promoted semantic rules against their cited source episodes at recall time before surfacing them in recall.

semanticConsolidationEnabled.label: Semantic Consolidation
semanticConsolidationEnabled.help: Enable periodic semantic consolidation of similar memories.

semanticConsolidationModel.label: Semantic Consolidation Model
semanticConsolidationModel.help: LLM for consolidation synthesis: 'auto' (primary model), 'fast' (fast local model), or a specific model name.

semanticConsolidationThreshold.label: Semantic Consolidation Threshold
semanticConsolidationThreshold.help: Token overlap threshold (0-1) for grouping similar memories. 0.8=conservative, 0.6=aggressive.

semanticConsolidationMinClusterSize.label: Semantic Consolidation Min Cluster Size
semanticConsolidationMinClusterSize.help: Minimum cluster size before consolidation triggers.

semanticConsolidationExcludeCategories.label: Semantic Consolidation Exclude Categories
semanticConsolidationExcludeCategories.help: Memory categories excluded from semantic consolidation.

semanticConsolidationIntervalHours.label: Semantic Consolidation Interval (Hours)
semanticConsolidationIntervalHours.help: Hours between automatic consolidation runs (168 = weekly).

semanticConsolidationMaxPerRun.label: Semantic Consolidation Max Per Run
semanticConsolidationMaxPerRun.help: Max memories to consolidate per run to limit LLM cost.

creationMemoryEnabled.label: Creation Memory
creationMemoryEnabled.help: Enable creation-memory foundations, including the work-product ledger for explicit outputs agents create.

memoryUtilityLearningEnabled.label: Utility Learning
memoryUtilityLearningEnabled.help: Enable utility-learning telemetry storage so later slices can learn promotion and ranking weights from downstream outcomes.

promotionByOutcomeEnabled.label: Promotion By Outcome
promotionByOutcomeEnabled.help: Enable outcome-aware promotion controls that will consume learned utility signals in later rollout slices.

commitmentLedgerEnabled.label: Commitment Ledger
commitmentLedgerEnabled.help: Enable the explicit commitment ledger for promises, follow-ups, deadlines, and unfinished obligations.

commitmentLifecycleEnabled.label: Commitment Lifecycle
commitmentLifecycleEnabled.help: Enable fulfillment transitions, stale tracking, and resolved-entry cleanup for the commitment ledger.

commitmentStaleDays.label: Commitment Stale Days
commitmentStaleDays.help: Days before an open commitment without a due date counts as stale.

commitmentLedgerDir.label: Commitment Ledger Directory
commitmentLedgerDir.help: Override where commitment ledger entries are stored.

resumeBundlesEnabled.label: Resume Bundles
resumeBundlesEnabled.help: Enable deterministic resume-bundle storage and explicit handoff bundle commands.

resumeBundleDir.label: Resume Bundle Directory
resumeBundleDir.help: Override where resume bundles are stored.

workProductRecallEnabled.label: Work-Product Recall
workProductRecallEnabled.help: Inject prompt-relevant work-product ledger entries into recall context and expose artifact-recovery search tooling.

workProductLedgerDir.label: Work-Product Ledger Directory
workProductLedgerDir.help: Override where work-product ledger entries are stored.

actionGraphRecallEnabled.label: Action Graph Recall
actionGraphRecallEnabled.help: Write action-conditioned causal-stage edges from typed trajectory records into the causal graph.

factDeduplicationEnabled.label: Fact Deduplication
factDeduplicationEnabled.help: Prevent storing semantically identical facts using content hashing

semanticDedupEnabled.label: Semantic Dedup (write-time)
semanticDedupEnabled.help: Skip near-duplicate facts at write time by comparing embeddings to existing memories (issue #373).

factArchivalEnabled.label: Fact Archival
factArchivalEnabled.help: Automatically archive old, low-importance, rarely-accessed facts during consolidation

factArchivalProtectedCategories.label: Archival Protected Categories
factArchivalProtectedCategories.help: Categories that are never archived regardless of age or importance

lifecycleFilterStaleEnabled.label: Filter Stale Lifecycle Memories
lifecycleFilterStaleEnabled.help: If enabled, retrieval may filter stale lifecycle memories (activated in PR20D)

lifecycleProtectedCategories.label: Lifecycle Protected Categories
lifecycleProtectedCategories.help: Categories lifecycle policy should not auto-archive

lifecycleMetricsEnabled.label: Lifecycle Metrics
lifecycleMetricsEnabled.help: Write lifecycle metrics snapshots to state/lifecycle-metrics.json

proactiveExtractionEnabled.label: Proactive Extraction
proactiveExtractionEnabled.help: Enable proactive self-questioning extraction second-pass (v8.3, default off)

contextCompressionActionsEnabled.label: Context Compression Actions
contextCompressionActionsEnabled.help: Enable context compression action tools and action telemetry (v8.3, default off)

compressionGuidelineLearningEnabled.label: Compression Guideline Learning
compressionGuidelineLearningEnabled.help: Enable adaptive compression guideline learning from action outcomes (v8.3, default off)

compressionGuidelineSemanticRefinementEn.label: Compression Semantic Refinement
compressionGuidelineSemanticRefinementEn.help: Enable optional semantic refinement after deterministic guideline generation (v8.11, default off)

proactiveExtractionCategoryAllowlist.label: Proactive Category Allowlist
proactiveExtractionCategoryAllowlist.help: Optional list of memory categories that proactive second-pass writes may emit

behaviorLoopAutoTuneEnabled.label: Behavior Loop Auto-Tune
behaviorLoopAutoTuneEnabled.help: Enable bounded runtime policy auto-tuning from correction/preference signals (v8.15, default off)

behaviorLoopProtectedParams.label: Behavior Protected Params
behaviorLoopProtectedParams.help: Parameter keys that auto-tuning must never change

knowledgeIndexEnabled.label: Knowledge Index
knowledgeIndexEnabled.help: Inject a compact table of top entities into every recall

entityRetrievalEnabled.label: Entity Retrieval
entityRetrievalEnabled.help: Inject direct-answer entity hints for entity questions and short follow-up queries

entitySummaryEnabled.label: Entity Summaries
entitySummaryEnabled.help: Generate LLM summaries for entities during consolidation

recallPipeline.label: Recall Pipeline
recallPipeline.help: Ordered section configuration for recall assembly and per-section limits

recallMmrEnabled.label: Recall MMR (Diversity)
recallMmrEnabled.help: Apply Maximal Marginal Relevance per-section so duplicate clusters cannot dominate the recall budget

recallMmrTopN.label: MMR Top-N
recallMmrTopN.help: Number of top candidates per section over which MMR is applied
